title: Reporting Phishing or Suspicious Emails
text:
Q: How do I report a phishing or suspicious email?
A: Step 1: Open your email client (e.g., Outlook, Gmail). Step 2: Locate the suspicious email in your inbox. Step 3: Do not click on any links or download attachments from the email. Step 4: In Outlook, right-click the email and select 'Report Phishing'. In Gmail, click the three dots in the top right corner and select 'Report phishing'. Step 5: If prompted, provide any additional information about why you believe the email is suspicious. Step 6: After reporting, delete the email from your inbox to prevent accidental clicks. Step 7: If you have already clicked on a link or provided personal information, immediately change your password and contact the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com. Step 8: Stay vigilant and report any further suspicious emails you may receive.
